ValidationRule.description: Ensures that when a Minimum Amount is provided, both the Minimum Amount Frequency and Minimum Amount Currency fields are also completed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(MinimumAmount__c)), MinimumAmount__c > 0, OR( ISPICKVAL(MinimumAmountFrequency__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(MinimumAmountCurrency__c, "") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Minimum Amount Frequency and Currency are required when a Minimum Amount is specified.
